feature.name: HTML formatter core
feature.description: Extract Pygments HTML syntax highlighting formatter and highlight() integration with lexers as a standalone package.
included_behaviors: render token streams to HTML spans with HtmlFormatter
highlight source with highlight(code, lexer, formatter)
support nowrap, linenos, cssclass, and title options
escape HTML in source text and preserve token class names
resolve Python lexer for integrated highlighting
excluded_behaviors: image, LaTeX, RTF, SVG, and terminal formatters
full lexer catalog beyond Python integration

entanglement.description: HTML formatting couples formatter option state, style registries, token-to-CSS mapping, and lexer-driven highlight pipelines.
signals: line number and wrapper table state

output.import: from featurelifted import highlight, HtmlFormatter, get_lexer_by_name
output.signature: highlight(code: str, lexer: Lexer, formatter: Formatter, outfile: IO[str] | None = None) -> str
